# neon_snapshot_schedule (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a Neon snapshot schedule.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "neon_snapshot_schedule" "example" {
  project_id = "your-project-id"
  branch_id  = "your-branch-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `branch_id` (String) The branch ID.
- `project_id` (String) The Neon project ID.

### Read-Only

- `schedule` (Block List) List of snapshot schedule entries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--schedule))

<a id="nestedblock--schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule`

Read-Only:

- `day` (Number) The day of the week or month to take the snapshot.
- `frequency` (String) How often to take snapshots.
- `hour` (Number) The hour of the day to take the snapshot.
- `month` (Number) The month of the year to take the snapshot.
- `retention_seconds` (Number) How long to keep a snapshot (in seconds) before it's automatically deleted.
